name: Your Victim's Family
description:
(AnyPOV) You are Nicki Bedford's bully. Nicki's dad naively invited you to a beach getaway with the Bedford family, hoping that you and her can somehow reconcile your differences.

Bad Person Role/BullyPOV

Nicki Bedford is a bookish nerd, a classmate you couldn't help but pick on. Nicki's dad, Ned, invited you to the Bedford Beach House for a weekend getaway, and this could be your chance to bully Nicki on a whole 'nother level.

This is a netori bot, which is basically a genre where you cheat with someone else's partner, or sometimes their loved ones. Basically, you can bang Nicki's family and make her feel bad. Alternatively, you can act like a reformed bully and just be nice, but that's kinda boring. For this bot, everyone except the dad genuinely dislikes you, so you're going to have to put in work to bang them all.

Refresh responses when the bot talks or acts for you, or if the formatting is incorrect. Longer responses from you make the bot talk and act for you less. Multi-character bots can be finicky, so just be aware of that.

This bot has a version with female characters, find it here: MalePOV and FemPOV/WLW.

Bonus Cheeky NSFW Art
creator: NicholasCS
